zh.lifeSummary: 當Anna Maria Nagelin於1770年3月8日出生在德國貝也普法爾茲時，她的父親Johann Jacob Nagel42歲，母親Anna Elisabetha Nageln40歲。她於1791年7月10日與Joh. Daniel Mohr在德國貝也藍德可萊斯 庫瑟爾岡格洛夫結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和2個女兒的父母。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Anna Maria Nagelin于1770年3月8日出生在德国貝也普法爾茲时，她的父亲Johann Jacob Nagel42岁，母亲Anna Elisabetha Nageln40岁。她于1791年7月10日与Joh. Daniel Mohr在德国貝也藍德可萊斯 庫瑟爾岡格洛夫结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和2个女儿的父母。

nameMeanings.name: Nagelin
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Scandinavian Anders, Lars.
Swedish: ornamental name from hage (see Haga ) + the suffix -lin, derived from Latin -(l)inius ‘relating to’.

variants.name: Hagele
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Otto, Armin, Erwin, Gerd.
in the south from a pet form of the personal name Hagin (see Hagen ).

nameMeanings.name: Anna
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: variant of Anne , in common use as a given name in most European languages. Among people with a classical education, it has from time to time been associated with Virgil's Aeneid, where it is borne by the sister of Dido , Queen of Carthage. This Phoenician name may ultimately be of Semitic origin, and thus related to the biblical Anne. However, the connection, if it exists, is indirect rather than direct.

variants.name: Anne
meanings: variant of Anne , in common use as a given name in most European languages. Among people with a classical education, it has from time to time been associated with Virgil's Aeneid, where it is borne by the sister of Dido , Queen of Carthage. This Phoenician name may ultimately be of Semitic origin, and thus related to the biblical Anne. However, the connection, if it exists, is indirect rather than direct.

nameMeanings.name: Maria
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of   Maria  , of German origin but now also moderately popular in the English-speaking world.

historicEvents.title: Germans defeat Napolean in Leipzig
historicEvents.description: On Oct 19, 1813, Germany defeats Napolean. The commanding officer for the Allied side was Prince Karl Phillipp Schwarzenberg.
The Congress of Vienna established the German Confederation of 39 independent German states.

historicEvents.title: The Book of Mormon Published in German
historicEvents.description: On May 25, 1852, the Book of Mormon is published in German.
historicEvents.urlTitle: The Book of Mormon Published in German

historicEvents.description: War: Prussia and Austria vs. Denmark.

en.lifeSummary: When Anna Maria Nagelin was born on 8 March 1770, in Palatinate, Bavaria, Germany, her father, Johann Jacob Nagel, was 42 and her mother, Anna Elisabetha Nageln, was 40. She married Joh. Daniel Mohr on 10 July 1791, in Gangloff, Kusel, Bavaria, Germany. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 2 daughters.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Anna Maria Nagelin est née le 8 mars 1770, à Pfalz, Bayern, Allemagne, son père, Johann Jacob Nagel, avait 42 ans et sa mère, Anna Elisabetha Nageln, avait 40 ans. Elle a épousé Joh. Daniel Mohr le 10 juillet 1791, à Gangloff, Landkreis Kusel, Bayern, Allemagne. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 2 filles.

de.lifeSummary: Als Anna Maria Nagelin am 8. März 1770 in Pfalz, Bayern, Deutschland geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Johann Jacob Nagel 42 und ihre Mutter Anna Elisabetha Nageln 40. Sie hat am 10. Juli 1791 in Gangloff, Landkreis Kusel, Bayern, Deutschland Joh. Daniel Mohr geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 2 Töchter.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Anna Maria Nagelin è nata il il 8 marzo 1770 nel Pfalz, Bayern, Germania, sua padre, Johann Jacob Nagel, aveva 42 anni e sua madre, Anna Elisabetha Nageln, aveva 40 anni. Lei sposato Joh. Daniel Mohr il 10 luglio 1791, nel Gangloff, Landkreis Kusel, Bayern, Germania. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 2 figlie.

ja.lifeSummary: Anna Maria Nagelinが1770年3月8日にドイツバイエルンプファルズで生まれた時，父Johann Jacob Nagelは42歳，母Anna Elisabetha Nagelnは40歳であった。1791年7月10日にドイツバイエルンランドクレイス クセルガングロッフでJoh. Daniel Mohrと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。

ko.Becherbach, Pfalz, Bavaria, Germany: 독일 베이른 랜드크레이스 쿠셀 베처바치 브이 커 베처바치

ko.lifeSummary: Anna Maria Nagelin(이)가 1770년 3월 8일 독일 베이른 p팔즈에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Johann Jacob Nagel(은)는 42세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Anna Elisabetha Nageln(은)는 40세였다. 그녀는 1791년 7월 10일 독일 베이른 랜드크레이스 쿠셀 갱글로프에서 Joh. Daniel Mohr(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Anna Maria Nagelin nasceu em 8 de março de 1770, em Pfalz, Bayern, Alemanha, seu pai, Johann Jacob Nagel, tinha 42 anos e sua mãe, Anna Elisabetha Nageln, tinha 40 anos. Ela casou-se com Joh. Daniel Mohr em 10 de julho de 1791, em Gangloff, Landkreis Kusel, Bayern, Alemanha. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 2 filhas.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Anna Maria Nagelin родилась 8 марта 1770 г. в местности пфалз, беиирн, Германия, её отцу по имени Johann Jacob Nagel было 42 года, а матери, которую звали Anna Elisabetha Nageln, 40. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Joh. Daniel Mohr 10 июля 1791 г. в местности ганглофф, ландкрис кусел, беиирн, Германия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 2 дочери.

Se casó con Joh. Daniel Mohr el 10 de julio de 1791, en Gangloff, Landkreis Kusel, Bayern, Alemania. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 2 hijas.
